Komentar: Payangan, was very cool around 24-25 deg when other parts of UBUD was 30-34 deg. It was like Hill station. Though the staff shortage was evident, staff was cooperative. Daun lebar should have door bells for each room. Staff was found standing outside the door and calling us to open the door. Also, no landline facility which should be improved. Rest my stay was very good and pleasant
Enjoyed staying. Good size and beautiful villa for a big family. Very quiet, relaxing place. The staff was very kind. Some of the interior fixtures need to be updated.
A comfortable villa with a clean private pool, the location is suitable for honeymooners.

I stayed at Daun Lebar Villas for my honeymoon in May 2024, and it was a truly pleasant experience. The facilities and food were excellent, and overall, it offered great value for money. Although the villa is located quite far from the town and shops, and the route can be a little tricky, this distance makes the environment peaceful and calm — perfect for a relaxing getaway. The staff were friendly and helpful, and the cleanliness of the villa was generally good. However, the toilet had a slight odor; it would be nice if the management could provide air fresheners to improve that. Overall, my stay at Daun Lebar Villas was wonderful. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a private pool villa with a serene atmosphere at a reasonable price.
The villa is very nice, and the staff service is very friendly. Recommended for those who want to stay in Ubud.

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Komentar: We had a such wonderful stay at the Villa. The experience was truly memorable -- The room was amazing and clean, spacious, comfortable, and beautifully designed. The access to the villa is a bit challenging, but it's absolutely worth it. The staff were friendly and helpful. Overall, I recommend Daun Lebar Villas to anyone looking for a pleasant and relaxing getaway.
We stayed for 2 days and was absolutely wonderful property gives you a whole villa with private living room and pool absolutely wonderful service and the food there is real good
The room are wonderful for the price bed is comfy Staffs are nice (okay) Cleanliness is below chain hotel standard Overall is superb for the price that we paid
A different and unique experience. Quite in through the plantations.... Great rooms and stay...Lovely breakfast with great service! we enjoyed out stay....

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Komentar: The place was very nice inside a village and very calm, the staffs were great especially Krishna, Tapa, Jenny were great, they helped us from check in to food, motor cycle and it was a pleasant stay overall.
Very friendly staff, nice villa to stay, but a few things need repairs, will be back next time.

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa

But I enjoyed peace and quiet with the beautiful pool and the sounds of frogs and the quietness and the beauty of nature
It is a bit far from Ubud city but is a quiet place to stay. The staff is very friendly. It is time to change some of the facilities and fix them. Overall, we enjoyed our stay.

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Komentar: Daun Leda villa was a perfect place for us to recharge after riding around Bali on a motorbike for the last 5 days. It is quiet, nicely nestled amongst the rice fields and luscious greenery. It has all we need in the villa to take it slow and easy. The staff are courteous and helpful. Thank you!

Even when I forgot to tell that I have to wake up very early and need to pickup, they still give me the pickup at 5 am. Foods are good and tasty! Overall I've enjoyed our honeymoon here for 3 days 2 nights!

Tipe Kamar: Three Bedroom Villa with Private Pool
Komentar: The rooms are spacious and clean. The staff is friendly. It is an ideal place for staycation. The location is rather far from Ubud town centre, and may face difficulties in getting GoFood to deliver to this villa.

Located in less crowded place, no motor sound, so serenity and calm place. Nice bathtub, hot water working well, nice clean bathroom with good shower. The bath foam smell nice (sensatia) Nice clean pool, TV ok, dinning area ok, wifi not working well but its okay since it is staycation away from digital world. This Villa surrounded with tall treasure, so refreshing. No mosquito no insect. I love the bathtub with glass window facing to small Garden.
Loved the location and value for money. The staff was friendly, amenities top notch, and housekeeping excellent. Cleanliness could be improved. But overall loved to stay here.

The Villas offered ample room space, perfect for families. The bathrooms were clean and well-mainted. The staff was attentive and accommodating, enhancing the overall experience. The facilities provided added value to our stay. The outside area can use more lights at night. The Villa private pool was a hit with the kids.

To start off, I was very pleased with my stay. I love that each unit has its own pool and privacy. Resort is in a quiet location so you hear all of nature. One thing to know is none of the rooms have a phone, so in order to contact the front desk you have to use Whatsapp. It’s not a quick response sometimes, but it is what it is. The upside is you have streaming options like Netflix, a pleasant surprise for me. If you’re in the single room, the tv is inside, but the 3 bedroom has only one tv and it’s in the outdoor living area. So if you like watching tv in bed, not happening with the 3 bedroom. I do not know what options you would have if that’s needed. Since the resort is a little out from city center, there are no restaurants nearby, but the restaurant at the resort makes up for that. The food there is very delicious! I preferred eating there anyway. Another thing to keep in mind is you are surrounded by nature, so there will be lizards, frogs, and mosquitoes, etc. You don’t see them on the website, but they are there 😊. Really didn’t have much of an issue with them, but do keep the door closed. The resort has two sections and the are across the street from one another. The main section where you check in has the breakfast and the other section has lunch and dinner. A short walk if you choose or call for ride. The road does get muddy if it rains, so if you’re wearing nice shoes, do not take the walk. This is a place I could revisit, staff was really nice and many of the resorts are also a little out of the way, so really not a problem especially if you have a driver.

The design of the room is very nice, the pool villa is big enough. Something need to be improved such as no shower cap, no slippers, no umbrellas in the room. Hair dryer has to be borrowed from the reception, which is funny for this price of hotel. Just be careful that when the cook is changed, the same menu of food can be very different. But they nicely canceled the food for us.
The whole environment here is so so so good until we dont wanna check out from this heaven. The only letdown is the mosquitoes, otherswise its near to perfect

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa

i have enjoy to stay at your hotel overall the service is good and the accomodation is good and the staff its great . but the last day of my stay i have some trouble with the water even the staff can handle but its take to long to enjoy my shower at the time because we most check out . there is only little bit problem with the water system but overall i enjoy to stay at your property

I can confidently say this place offers great value for money! While the location is in a village, I really enjoyed the vibes. I would love to come back, especially since the pool was quite large and the pantry spacious. Overall, a fantastic experience!

Staffnya ramah dan baik, cocok buat yang suka sama alam dengan konsep open space, villanya terang dan bersih, resto oke, spa sama mba Rosita enak sekali pijitannya, memang agak jauh dari Ubud pusat tapi aku sih bakal tetep balik kesini kalo ke Ubud karena suka sama konsep villanya, untuk makanannya masih harga standart, cuma mungkin agak tawar aja, sisanya oke
The property offers spacious rooms, perfect for family with young children. However, the location, cleanliness , staff, service and facilities were average. Need some improvements in this areas.

Expect for location, all other aspects are good. Friendly staffs, who had accommodated our early breakfast request. With kids, they did few customisations as well since we were pure veg. Individual villa rooms with private pool. Worth staying for a relaxed trip.
Towel and bedsheet is smelly. The staff is good and friendly. But I will not recommend as the place are too isolated. No shop nearby.

Villanya bersih dan cantik. Posisi cocok buat yg mau semedi, krn cukup jauh dr Ubud kota. Tapi sayangnya amenitiesnya kurang ya, rak handuk gak ada padahal ada private pool. Posisi pool ke kamar mandi hrs nyebrang kamar, jadi kamar basah2, keset minim. Hair dryer super limited, butuhnya malem, malah mau dianternya pagi krn belum tersedia katanya (yah rambutnya keburu kering donk). Jumlah tempat sampah jg minim untuk size villa segitu. Harga makanan cukup pricey, dan ga punya pilihan lain 😢 padahal jauh dari mana2, minimarket sekalipun.
Kesini untuk honeymoon, rasa makanan standar, room nya bagus dan luar serta benar2 private. Sayang pool nya kurang bersih, jd kami tdk jadi bermain di pool.
No buffet breakfast they serve with fix menu. food is average but rooms are clean and with basic amenities. grab taxi is available there for local transport. No market is nearby

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Komentar: The first room we stayed in was quite bad, not as nice as the pictures. The sun loungers were missing from the pool, holes in the decking, sharp nails and loose planks making it a bit of a trip hazard. The pool was dirty, staff did ask if we wanted it cleaned when we arrived - this didn’t happen until the next day. The bathroom in the morning had a bad sewer smell coming from it, enough to wake us up. The air con was good and the bed was very comfortable. We extended our stay by one day due to me hurting my knee, the second room was beautiful and new! And looked just like the pics of our original booking. Second room was located on the other side of the road where there is a pool for all guests (for some reason we were never told that the other building existed when we arrived). This villa is around 40 minutes from the centre, due to traffic (not just up the road like other reviews suggest) Be prepared to sit in a lot of traffic if you are planning to do trips, go to town etc. There is a spa, and a restaurant - we had to ask for the menus. I think the check-in could be improved to cover in more detail the facilities of the hotel, give guests a tour etc. staff was instead quite pushy in selling tours/excursions, all of which we’d already booked online so wasn’t necessary - and they seemed disappointed about that and kept asking what our plans were, who we booked with, where we’re going etc.
Lokasinya pedesaan sangat tenang. Cocok untuk yang sedang cari ketenangan jauh dari keramaian kota. Tempat bersih dan masih baru.
Nice place to stay with family. In the morning toilet smells bad from sink maybe. No hairdryer. Breakfast standard.

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Komentar: The place wss too deep inside and it's very hard to get a gojek to go to the town. The towel that they gave its dirty to use. i hope in the future they could gave a clean one...staff was very nice.

Judul: Room is ok but no support for travel facilities
Komentar: This is bit far from the city, but I was expected some facility for transport like rent for bike or car. But here is no service for rent for bike and for car it is too expensive and they are not allowing for external service also which was faced issues

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Komentar: Location is very far from centre, very hard to find Gojek & grab. No basic amenities provided. No phone service in room you have to WhatsApp them if you need any help. Service very slow. Frog and insects voice inside villa in night. Not much options for vegetation in restaurant. Ac water coming inside room.

Judul: Not in accordance with the price.
Komentar: With the price ***, I received a room and treatment that was less than pleasant from the front office staff. 1. I was repeatedly asked to pay an extra charge (extra person). For a 3-bedroom, I came with 6 adults + 3 kids under 8 years. I was asked to pay extra charges twice for which I didn't know the reason. I understand that I will pay for the extra breakfast. But is it necessary to charge for kids sharing a bed with their parents? Each room only had 2 + 1 people, which I think is VERY STANDARD for hotels. Why was I continuously asked to pay extra charges per person? In the end, after they saw the proof that I booked the villa for 6 adults + 2 children, having 1 extra child is still very reasonable. For a three-bedroom, by the way. 2. One towel was clean white, while the other one was a dirty gray. Even the bath mat was much cleaner than the bath towels. 3. No coffee. Only tea bags were provided. After I requested, they brought me a cup of instant coffee 😅. How is that possible? Meanwhile, the terms and conditions state that benefits include coffee & tea. 4. Bees! In the evening, there were about 20 bees in our villa. They even entered the bedroom 🥲. This was the scariest part. Breakfast was just OK. Maybe because we were local guests, we were thought to cheat. But please check the condition of the villa when we checked out. We even brought our own garbage bag to help maintain cleanliness.
Breakfast sangat minim, extrabed tidak tersedia, fasilitas hny kolam renang kecil , tv tdk ada channel .

This villa is the worst one we have ever stayed at. The cleanliness of the villa was disgusting. As soon as we walked into the villa we were greeted with black mould on the sliding door curtain and the curtains over the bed in both rooms. We wanted to relax as we had travelled 3 hours to get to our villa, however the sheets on the beds were covered in stains and so were the towels. Housekeeping came to change the sheets and tried atleast 10 different ones before finding two without any stains and that’s just the start….. The living area was infested with flies. The lamp was rusty. There was a frog in the shower. The floorboards were not nailed down and are a hazard. The aircon did not work. The bathroom reeked of musk and the toilet and shower had both not been cleaned- both had stains. Now, we went across the road to their other restaurant for dinner and was provided with the exact same menu that was at the villa. While that sucked, we still ordered food. While the food was being prepared we wandered around by the pool. The bar has an open roof on the bottom floor so you can see straight in and that is when we saw a rat run across the bench and chopping board. Truely horrifying as we were about to eat. For the amount that we paid and the length we were going to be staying, it was appalling, we ended up checking out and checking into a new villa as they didn’t have any other rooms available. Which also put us out of pocket. I have reached out to the villa and Agoda to organise a full or partial refund and have not heard back from either. This experience was atrocious.

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Komentar: We came from Australian, we had bad time in here. The villa’s very far from Ubud, the reception staff she told they have a free service transport to ubud. I booked villa 2 nights but no transport service, I ask them and they booked locally drive from villa to ubud 224. 000/way.We checked the price on grab app only 150-170/ way, villa’s not allown pick up in there. We hadn’t more option, we booked return locally transport, he waited us in Ubud but he was unhappy and always ask how long can go back? I complanted him I hope they can check service. I don’t like food at villa, bad service. The wifi’s shit because long on way. Never back this villa again.

The location of the villa is quite extreme due to the steep inclines and ceramic descents, and the access is narrow. The parking is tight when full. My disappointment is that for the first time renting a villa with a private pool, I was charged an extra 120,000 per day for the number of people, citing the addition of mineral water and towels. On my last day, I did not receive extra mineral water or towels; I had to ask for them first, unlike several private pool villas I have rented in Bali, which never charged extra for additional guests except for breakfast. I only need to come here once.

NOT A 4-STAR HOTEL!!! LOCATION - The property is quite remote. I wouldn't recommend it if you want to stay close to the action. DECOR - While the rooms and open space were done up well, was not thought through. All the switches and plugs were hiding behind the beds. We had to move the beds to be able to access the plugs and switch on some lights. BASICs - it was missing simple basics like a hand towel, hand wash soap, mosquito repellent. When asked to provide hand towels and hand soap, they said they don't provide that. We were shocked to hear that. We kept demanding and they finally gave liquid soap in a shot glass and hand 2 hand towels full of stains. The bath towels were also not clean. For mosquito repellant, we were given a spray and expected us to use that with children in our rooms. Given the area is in the nature, there are many mosquitoes, one would expect them to provide mosquito repellent machines in room. FOOD – we just had lunch there and didn’t like anything that we ordered. TAXI / TOUR ACTIVITIES / AMENITIES - The don’t allow Grab on property and you can only book local taxis through the hotel which are obviously pricier that Grab taxi. We booked the property as they had amenities and expected them to help with booking tour activities as they are so outside of UBUD, there is no other tourist operator in the vicinity. But on arrival we were told some activities were unavailable and when asked to share details about the other tourist activities, their staff didn’t have any details and instead asked me to speak to local cab driver to share details. WIFI - NO WIFI in rooms. Only in the open area. Also, note they are so remote that the mobile data coverage in the area is really poor. HOSPITALITY - The property manager Mr Rai wasn’t all ears to our issues LISTEN and we had such a bad experience, that we checked out after 1st night, having booked for 3 nights.

When we book Villa, they mentioned that there is a full kitchen in the details of facility they provide. Nothing provided except 4 plates, a sink and storage. NO microwave, NO gas, NO dishwasher, NO cutlery, NO cooking utensils.

Komentar: First we staying the first room at the villa, 1. No privacy : Our room is infront of the public pool. There's no privacy at all even there's pool inside. There fencing is seeing through and make us close our curtain all the yajne 2. Location is far from city, everywhere need 35mins to 45mins. The road is narrow and dark, dangerous, even grab driver told us he is scared and our driver cancelled out next day due to the dangerous of the road in to the villa. Won't recommend own rent car /bike as the road is hot friendly for tourist who doesn't familiar the road. 3. No foods nearby 4. Front desk service is bad, ask to do laundry pick up they never do. Mentioned few request they choose few easy one to answer. They asked us to communicate via WhatsApp only but the reply is not as promo as it 5. Don't have door bell, they shout to open the door. Few times got woke up as they calling neighbout 6. No room service unless request 7. The private swimming pool is not wellmaintain 8. Go for expensive spa service but I think the service can be better. The toilet bowl was broken and we were shivering doing the massage during the body scrub session

Lastly since this location is very far from center don’t expect Grab to deliver anything immediately.

this is my 3rd time staying here. all previous stays were pleasant - staff was warm, and rooms were in working condition. This trip was bad. after almost a month, they have not emailed me my hotel receipt, which i requested. During the stay, the fan was not working and could not find the remote, no hair dryer is provided in the room (basic necessity), staff was not responsive to requests, room floor was dirty, toilets were not properly cleaned. Not sure what happened . i gave it a bad rating but you could get lucky. So, it use to be good… this time it was terrible.

He treated us like 3rd class citizens, after bringing this up with him and criticizing his behaviour he doubled down and suddenly become nice". Food wasn't too bad. But there was 21% TAX. Hot water is one of the top priority. And when we complain, all the staff has gone by 11pm. Only security. And they can't do anything. We complain but same trouble happen again.

First of all the front desk is not 24/7 meaning if you need anything or have any issue with your room after midnight no one can help you or even pick up the call. Second, we asked for refill body wash and even take the pump out to let them know, they do not refill and simply put back the lid and put back into the shower. Third, they do not give clean towers. We have 5 people and one night they do not take the used one away from the laundry bag and only gave us 2 new towels. Lastly, the staff is not of much helpful and did not really help us to solve all the above complaints. Overall it has not been a pleasant stay.

Tempat nya sangat jauh dari kota, bersih, makanan lumayan enak

Judul: Unlimited serenity in the middle of paddy fields
Komentar: It was a great location for people who want to stay in the middle of natural surrounding. No hustle bustle of the Ubud city. Beautiful villas with private pools. Excellent room service and very accommodating staffs. On the limitations, there’s isn’t much option from in-house restaurant. Also, getting a taxi or a regular cab for daily commuting is difficult. However the reception can arrange cab in a short time. Look forward to my detailed review on Trip Advisor.
The villa is quite a distance from Ubud Center. It’s about 20mins drive.
The best!
If you want to get away from the city life, Daun Lebar is the best choice.Remote and away from the noises. Pleasant surroundings. Wonderful staffs. Good food. All together a happy stay.
Good villa even its far away from City
This is my second visit to the villa. I love everything about the villa, the pool, the interior and exterior. It is really homey.
Friendly helpful staff, clean premises and quiet peaceful location
this hotel is very clean, staff very friendly, but the location is too far form center of ubud

Judul: Calm and peaceful place with great staff
Komentar: Located in secluded area with great exterior and interior. Staff always put a smile on their faces. Our family had a great time visiting Kintamani and Ubud area.
Great place to escape from chaos town
Good staff, very responsible
very clean, staf very humble n caring us during our stay
Nestled quite far from ubud central, it's a good option for those who want to be away from busy hustle life. Best for couple to have me time
Friendly staff but the location is too deep inside. Couldn't rent a bike because its very dangerous to ride there as there were too many steep uphill and downhill.

Villa, room, pool, bed, breakfast, staff all good! Its just we waited 30min for check in at 4pm (which is already pass check in time). And the is so much moth in the morning at the livingroom and kitchen.
nice villa layout. must review bedsheet, pillow cleaniness
Going here with toddler, everythings perfect
Best accommodations for its price!
Overall stay is good there. Kids love the pool in the villa.
BEST BEST BEST
Staff at villa is very nice and helpful.Always smiling.cleanliness is good .very close to ubud city

The villa seems rather run down in the interiors and the cleanliness is kinda lacking, especially for the living and dining area which is really dirty. The dining table and dining chairs as well as the sofa has really bad stains and the fridge was really dirty. The room and the toilet is alright. But overall, i think the cleanliness can be improved much more. The location of the accommodation is really very far in. Around 30mins from Ubud central. However, it was rather cooling with the natural wind and higher altitude temperature. The location might not be recommended for groups whereby transportation is a consideration.
Nice villa , and sooo peaceful. The neighbor hood its just awesome . Super friendly peoples 😍

Judul: Perfect idyllic with the best hospitality :)
Komentar: We spent 2 nights and we're loving every single minute of our stay. Staff were very helpful especially when I fell off the scooter and sprained my leg. Thank you Mbak Jenny for that good massage. Daun Lebar was definitely the highlight of our Bali trip!

enjoyed our stay. villa is huge, rooms n pool are also nice. bfast were good. only little things to improve, there was leaking in masterbedroom (i believe from AC). they should replace bath towels, face towels, all floor mate …inappropriate look already. and please provide bigger trash bin in kitchn area. tks

It's 30 mins car ride fr Ubud Center. In a quiet village. We love the seclusion. The property is big but bec of its surroundings expect some insects ard the property. But not mosquito for sure. There's no bedroom slippers when asked. Beautiful rice padi outside the property. And a bamboo walkway fr a nearby spa.
Loved it!!!

Judul: Great design. Not in Ubud as promoted. Need extra maintenance.
Komentar: Generally, the design looks absolutely great without complaint. However, it's a long 30-minute drive to Ubud center. The kitchen equipped with only 1 plate while my 2-bedroom villa furnished for 4 adults. The bathroom facility needs extra cleaning/maintenance to avoid lime scale built up on those metal shower equipments, or soap scum, water spots, and mineral deposits on glass shower door.
The weather is quite cold and far away from the crowd. So peaceful
Too far from centre city & the road quite smooth but narrow. Should pay more attention during driving.

Judul: It's the best for a family or couple
Komentar: It's the best for a family or couple. It's a really quiet countryside. If you just want to do nothing and rest, this place is perfect
If you are looking for isolated place this is good but the it’s inside a village called penangayan

I was traveling with the family of 9 and everyone was satisfied with the service, cleanliness and facilities. No single complain from them. You should take your loved ones too and stay at yuis villa if you plan to have a quite with rice fields surrounding you.

Very clean, very spacious, quiet, calm, cozy place to relax and forget my hectic daily life at work. I stayed in a well maintained 3 br villa which was fantastic, with combination of modern and traditional design. The space is very generous with complete facilities, good bed, good amenities, good aircon (not really needed since the air is pretty cold). This villa is very worth the money if you are looking for a place to relax and do nothing else but having a quality time with your partner or family. The only downside for me is the distance from main road and the access is pretty narrow. Other than that everything was perfect for me.

We stayed for 1 night as part of villa hopping life in Bali😁, booked this property through agoda and did not regret it at all. Surrounded by lush green rice field, serene environment, our own private pool with adequate depth. Clean bedrooms, crisps linens. Cool air and lots of plants giving it rural vibes with urban facility (smart tv enable us to binge Man vs Bee). We have fridge to store our children supplies, hot water pot. Tea and local coffee. Would be great if there is also stove and cooking utensils. Friendly and welcoming staffs, attentive and helpful to assist our adversities and exhaustion after driving from denpasar with starving children. Too bad we did not get to experience harvesting activities since the crops did not grow well due to the season. Definetely will recommend to other families to stay here. Thank you Daun Lebar team.

Judul: Best place to relax and escape
Komentar: New Villas in Payangan, Ubud. The Villas surrounded by rice fields and so relaxing. The staff so friendly, the butler was excellent service. The floating breakfast so good! So tasty. The wifi just a bit low connection sometimes. the facilities inside villa is cool. The bed is spacious and the pillow so good. Definitely will return

We choose to stay here after browsing for reviews. The fact that the villa has private pool and private kitchen make us really secure during these times. Facilities are really clean, service is truly great, the hotel staff remember my kids nicknames. Quick serving time whenever we call them for assistance. One of our best vacation. Breakfast are abundance & great, sent to our villa. Definitely will be our option in our future holiday to Ubud
Nice room and pool, clean, staff are friendly, no gym.

Judul: Local Setup... just dial down your expectation
Komentar: pros: the place is far away from most attractions and is great if you would like to wind down away from the buzz and crowds. Just go for the larger villa that will give you more freedom of space. Cons: the estate lacks maintenience. More attention could be paid to the details, like cobwebs, algae, plastics tips lying around the decking, wasps nest on sofa covering, glass shard on the floor mat etc
Really nice romantic place calm clean good food
The location is pretty bad, quite distance from the central ubud but you get the peaceful and serene surrounding. The rooms are fantastic and the staff are friendly
Staff was very friendly and helpful, Villa was a little dirty/dusty except for the pool, it was really clean. They have smart tv so we could play YouTube.

A great place to go when you want to forget about the world or you simply want to just get amongst the rice fields of Bali either way you will be fully recharged when you leave. It is also true what reviewers are saying about the staff warm and friendly and can't do enough for you. Ubud is a lovely place to truly take in Bali.
The hotel was great and worth every cent. Breakfast’s quite limited and not so good though but overall, this villas is perfect for our getaway trip or honeymoon

Judul: Comfort place, good food, great service
Komentar: Very comfy & clean villas, the facility is great, very friendly staffs, very on time & reliable airport transfer service, the free shuttle to ubud centre is very helpful, the food tastei recommend to try the bebek betutu if you have no idea what to order & u feel like to eat whats the local specialty menus. The pool was clean. It was our first time visit and we didn't regret anything we experienced here :)

Daun Lebar is a lovely, smaller complex of boutique villas. I was upgraded from a single bedroom to a double, to allow me to access a larger pool and outdoor living/dining area. The staff are very helpful and attentive. The food is lovely, the grounds and villas superb. I enjoyed bike riding around the village, yoga, multiple massages, day tours to the rice terraces, coffee at Bali Palina and sacred temples. I four wheeled drove up Mt Batur and hiked a short distance to watch the sunrise over Mt Agung then soaked in the hot springs of Lake Batur. Daily shuttle trips into Ubud for shopping and art galleries. An acoustic, resonance healing session at the Pyramids of Chi. I felt safe, secure and enjoyed every minute of my time at Daun Lebar. It is a 35 minute drive to Ubud, but I enjoyed each drive, as it gave me a chance to look at all the villages along the way.

The villa was awesome, being upgraded to 3 room villa but actually I wanted 1 room villa because I want to take photo is nicer. But I guess I have no choice they told me it was full. Anyway the 3 room villa was nice too! However, they can improve on the food, it wasn't tasty and the portion is small and of course is much expensive. However we have no choice as there's nothing outside the villa. The villa is located in a secluded area, be prepared to go through dark and depo forest. The floating basket was quite expensive just to rent it for a morning. Overall we enjoyed our stay, I wish I could spent more time.
Once you stepped inside the villa, you will feel like you never want to go outside and spend your days relaxing away from all the hassle. Very secluded and great for honeymoon.

1）The hotel is very remote, the grass is long and not trimmed. After living, I dare not come again. It is very difficult to sleep at night, and is awakened by the sound. 2）We originally booked 2 villas, and the hotel informed that the room was fully booked, so upgrade gave us a villa 3 bed room and gave us a 45min spa & dinner buffet, we agreed, but the hotel staff told us when the day arrived. The room was there again, so he changed back to our original reservation room, but didn't give notice in advance. Fortunately, we used to call to confirm before, otherwise we would have to go back to the city for dinner. We feel that the hotel should not change the room type we booked. Since it is determined that there is no room, after upgrading the room to us, it should not be changed, and without prior notice, I feel that the hotel service is too bad.

Judul: One of the best accommodation ever!
Komentar: Subject title says it all! Amazing villa with hospitable staffs from start to end. Although the location was pretty far in Ubud, the tranquility of this villa is exceeded my expectation. The rooms were clean and the private pool was just perfect. Would love stay here again for sure!

If you are looking for serene & quiet stay then Daun Lebar is your choice. It is far from town which is not convenient for us if you are looking for cafe, food, massage & shopping. Our unpleasant experience was during heavy rain, the hotel doesn't have a buggy to send us to lobby. Thus we had to walk with a distance with umbrella and nobody assist us to get onto our car.

First off the location wasn't really best. It's very secluded with no facilities around at all. If you prefer a quiet place to relax then this is a great place, but please remember to stock up some food/snacks because there's nowhere to go if you feel hungry at night! Rooms were clean and the staffs were really polite and helpful and they are always so smiley! Only bad thing is that because of the surroundings, you get alot of big bugs and flies flying around all the time!

We were booked for three nights. We complained about the bad odour in our Villa. We were moved to another Villa which was no different. We checked out on the third and the manager asked refund from Agoda

If you prefer staying within easy access of Ubud (or any other) town and the markets/restaurants it has to offer, then don't stay at Daun Lebar. But if you value a tranquil environment amidst quiet and serene surroundings, then it is a great choice. Allow for 30-45 minutes travel time to Ubud town in all of your plans. The food at the restaurant is quite good. The staff are extremely friendly and helpful.

Love the staff. Villa was nice but loads of flies and villa gate lock was spoilt. Food was okay but staff were super friendly and helpful. The staff were the best part of this whole place. Really beautiful but far out.

This villa is in a very quiet & secluded area. Took me more than 2hours ride to arrive in this peak season. The price for a pool villa like this is quite reasonable. I personally like the cozy bedroom & spacious bathroom a lot despite that there are a lot of flies all over the place including the breakfast area.

From the airport, it took about 2-2.5 hours to reach the villa, with parts of the road not having streetlights, so it’s quite dangerous on rainy nights (the roads were meandering too, with cliffs on the side). The rooms were clean, we stayed in a two-bedroom villa called Juwet. However, the plumbing wasn’t that good and one of the room smelled (we had to constantly turn the exhaust fan on). Plus there were LOTS of flies (which probably wasn’t their fault) but it added to the inconvenience. Imagine wanting to relax in the common room but there were about 40ish flies buzzing around at noon. At nights or when it rained hard there weren’t as many flies. Staffs were very friendly and eager to help, but they’re clearly not trained nor experienced. One of us asked for half-boiled or soft-boiled eggs, they came out too hard, or 80% raw. After a few tries, we gave up. Fruit slices were mainly dry, food experience in general wasn’t something to look forward for. And with the flies buzzing around, they put out cutleries in the open, which I think is not hygienic. Some of them asked us for our villa key so that they could clean our villa, which was weird since they should have their own keys. We didn’t give it, but later on someone tried to return the villa key to us (the key was actually their own set). The liquid soap in the bathroom needed to be refilled so we left the container open, but the housekeeper didn’t refill it. Asking your complimentary breakfast to be delivered to your room will cost you 200K IDR. Some hotels and villas offer this service for free. It wasn’t completely horrible, as the air was clean and fresh. It was refreshingly cold as well. But we think we won’t be coming back.
great place for honeymoon
The villa is clean and beautiful. The best thing about that villa is the friendly staff especially the manager. The manager had great communication and was very attentive. Will be coming back!

Our first impression of the place was very secluded but peaceful environment, we arrived and personally greeted by our names from one of the staffs. The villa located in ridge, so you can enjoy the true Ubud jungle ambiance, it has lustful of greeneries scene (very epic in our opinion) from the rice paddy fields to the big ancient trees around the complex and thus the cool weather of it. Once you arrive, the first sight on your left is open air style terrace with bamboo furnitures and your right is villa's restaurant. And if you have the good physical fitness, you can jog down a few hundred metres to the ravine where one of the local ancient Pura (Hindu's prayer hall or church for Christian believers) located. The villa also provided a few bicycles for free. You can also try their in house massage services, they have some packages starting from IDR 200k+++. My husband liked the Meapun Massage" it's a deep tissue massage with constant pressure concentrated on your back and shoulders."
We are greeted with a warm smile upon check in. The villa is beautiful and peaceful. Morning breakfast is fabulous too! Totally recommend this place for some peaceful time.

Just found this hotel open for one month hence staff are inexperience, especially the chep takes 1 hr to prepare breakfast in super big portion and taste is too salty. Then the toothpaste inside the room seems used.
The place is comfortable, but it's a bit on the outskirts of Ubud, somewhat far from the city. But overall, everything is comfortable. The price is cheap and the quality is great. Recommended.

Judul: Worst villa that I ever stayed
Komentar: If possible, I will just give 0 out of 5 stars to this villa. This the suck and poorest villa that I ever stayed in my entire life. For those who are looking for accommodation in Bali, please do avoid this villa. I just don’t understand why they can did things like this. Not professional and the way they talked to the guests also very suck. In fact, I will stay with them for 2 nights but I just check out after 1 night. Can you all imagine how bad experiences that I had. Here are the things that I want to highlight:- 1. Villa is very very far from the city. You can’t even get any gojek, grab here. Cause they banned online transport to their area. Force guest to use their transporter, the price is much more higher than in transport applications. Can imagine the price in Gojek is RP 87k but they told us if we use their transporter the charge will be RP 302k. That’s ridiculous. 2. Private Pool is not clean at all. I think they didn’t manage it properly. 3. There are a lot of flies in the room 4. Customer service here is really really bad. Even the manager can’t solve our problems. Keep saying sorry. I was like sorry for what? We just need to solution to be solved. Some more when the staffs came into our room, they just wore their shoe and walked into our room. That’s not hygiene man. 5. There are not any restaurants around their villa and they only serve for breakfast and dinner with charge. The only best part I can say is the room is huge. That’s the best part. Other than this, very suck! Better don’t spend your night with them it will just affect your mood of travelling.

friendly and helpful staff, can work on cleanliness and provide better necessities. Bedroom slippers not provided, hair dryer have to request every day. Could have install lights along the corridor and inside at the villa entrance as it is too dark to walk in at night time. Not convenient, no transport to leave villa area. Have to book for their transportation in order to go elsewhere.

Came here for our honeymoon and we definitely made the right choice, no regrets at all, the staff is extremely friendly and goes the extra mile for customers. There was a bit of a miscommunication about the kitchen equipment since it's only in the 2/3 bedroom, but don’t worry if you've already brought cooking ingredients, you can ask the chef to cook for you with an extra charge depending on what dish you want to prepare. For those who want to be away from the crowds and need peace, this place is really perfect, top-notch. 🫶🏻

The villa is somewhat set back from a small road, but the place is peaceful and the villa is clean, with all spots being very aesthetic and homey. It's perfect for those who want to relax away from the crowds. The staff is also very nice; at night I asked them to buy mineral water and instant noodles at the shop, and they got them for me. Thank you, Daun Lebar Villa!

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Komentar: If you want a place away from the crowds, this place is suitable for you. The villa is quite clean and everything is well-maintained, surrounded by rice fields, in a quiet atmosphere. If I may suggest, for room 201, it could be covered with trees or something because it can be seen from the front.
The villa is comfortable, quiet, far from the hustle and bustle... The food is also delicious.

Tipe Kamar: Three Bedroom Villa with Private Pool
Judul: Amazing stay at a fantastic property
Komentar: We had an amazing stay at this fantastic property. The location was perfect, allowing us to easily explore the surrounding area. The staff was incredibly friendly and helpful, making us feel welcome from the moment we arrived. The cleanliness of the property was impeccable, and the facilities provided exceeded our expectations. From the comfortable sleep to the reliable Wi-Fi, everything was top-notch. The bathroom was clean and well-maintained. The value for money was excellent, and we would highly recommend this property to anyone looking for a great place to stay. Overall, it was a truly exceptional experience.

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Judul: A villa that is worth it.
Komentar: The price is in line with the facilities and cleanliness, and everything is clean, the plants inside the villa are well-maintained, it's truly enjoyable to stay in this villa.
It would be better if the villas have a bell insted of knocking the door. Also, also the instects every where because of the lack of cleaning. Tge place need a daily maintainace

Judul: Nice Villa with large bath room
Komentar: I really like this Villa, it located in quiet area. And it is very clean. I get 2 nights here, with 2 different rooms. One is 2 rooms and the other nights is 3 rooms. When in 2 rooms, there is many ant in the bed. Make me a little worry with it. But it still ok. And the staff help us move our luggage when our in travelling. The bathroom is really huge. Especially in the master room, come with good shower gel, shampoo and conditioner. The hot water shower make me feel like having a massage in my back, I really like it. The bed is big and comfortable. The living room is nice too with good wifi and Netflix.

PROS: 👍 Nice villa located in a remote area with lush green scenery. 🏊 Private swimming pool in the 3-bedroom suite, perfect for bringing a large family. 🫶 No stairs, making it very suitable for elderly people with knee problems. CONS: 🤳 Got a price of around 2.6 million per night from July 23 to 24, 2023, but upon arrival, the room wasn’t ready for check-in because the toothbrush kits and soap for handwashing at the sink were missing in every bathroom. 🚿 The shower in the main room is leaking. 🛁 The bathtub never fills up because the drain cover is a bit loose. Also, the water flow into the bathtub is not strong enough. SUGGESTION: 🔨🪛 Please maintain the shower and bathtub to make it worth the price" because it’s quite difficult to bathe my 7-month-old baby. Waiting for the bathtub to fill feels like forever :("

Tipe Kamar: One Bedroom Villa with Private Pool
Komentar: Location is far from airport, takes 2.5 hours to reach which this is what we expected. As we already do our research before we book. Villa to Ubud market takes 40min drive, for food wise you may order grab delivery which is convenient. There are many restaurants, cafe and temple to visit around Ubud. Just that Ubud don’t have beach, you may need to travel to Kuta beach which is 2 hours drive. Staff was super helpful and friendly, breakfast timing start between 7am - 11am, even we woke up late at 12.30pm for breakfast, they are so kind and still prepare the breakfast for us. Kindly note, if you need hair dryer and kettle, you need to request from receptionist and they will send to your room. Room itself don’t have hair dryer and kettle. The Villa pool was nice, room and toilet was big and clean, but sadly they do not have gym facilities. Overall was great experience staying 5 days 4 nights, will be back again.

The villa is nice but needs extra maintenance; the pool tiles are broken, and the walls are peeling. The location is very far as it is located in a small alley and residential area. For those who enjoy a peaceful atmosphere away from the hustle and bustle, this is a suitable place to stay; it is very quiet and tranquil. The breakfast option is limited for Indonesian food, only fried rice or fried noodles. There is no microwave in the villa. Thanks.

Daun lebar was in the outskirts of ubud, about 40 minutes drive from ubud center. Staff are friendly and great. The rooms were very spacious and clean however the pool and pool chair could use some maintenance. The restaurant is very expensive compared to other places, very difficult to get food since this villa is far away from the center. Staff were very friendly, helpful and accommodating. They helped us to get a driver at a reasonable price to travel around ubud. Overall it’s a beautiful place to stay if you’re not planning to do many activities during your stay.

Daun Lebar Villas is located about 30 minutes north of Ubud main street. It's quiet, peaceful and surrounded by rice fields. We stayed at the 3 Bedroom VIlla since it has the largest pool, which the kids loved. The staffs were extremely friendly and helpful during our stay. The kitchen and some parts of the bathroom, however, needs better cleaning. That aside, we definitely enjoyed our stay in Daun Lebar.

Villas have pretty space inside. Mordern style, but some parts needed to be renovate. Our villa had 2 bedrooms+Open living room. Big kitchen,but not equiped for cooking, had only kettle. Villas have delivery of food to number, menu not variety but taste is good. If you like to stay for quite place, here is best option. But unfortunately too far to Central of Ubud (around 40minutes using a car). Pool’s water is not warmed , so water feeling little cold to swim . Pool have a good shape, but some details of floor was damaged, so be careful. Be ready, that on villa there are many different insects,especially ants. Stuff is very nice and friendly, ready to help. They help us with organizing Birthday surprises, with flowers and cake. In the end, we had great impression and memories about this villa.

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Komentar: Tuvimos un problema con la reserva por nuestra culpa y en vez de 2 habitaciones tuvimos solo 1. Por culpa de este problema tuve que pedir una cama extra. Cuando regresamos de nuesta excursion por la noche vi que la cama extra era en realidad un colchon en el suelo con sabanas. Al dia siguiente al hacer el check out por la manana nos cobraron 500000 ripias el equivalente a 30 euros por el colchon. Le explique a la recepcionista que no me parece normal que me cobren 30 euros por un colchon en el que no pude dormir. Aparte, el botones me rompio una rueda de la maleta. Solicite poner una reclamacion y me dieron una hoja de papel blanca. Pedi el email del responsable, envie 2 emails a las que aun no tengo ninguna respuesta. Me parece una tomadura de pelo y una falta de respeto.

Judul: Maleta rota y una cama extra un colchon en el suelo
Komentar: Muy mala experiencia con ellos.Pedimos una cama extra y al llegar tarde de visitar encontramos un colchon en el suelo.Eso no es una cama extra y se duerme muy mal.Encima no te dicen el precio que me parecio bastante alto y el chico que nos llevo la maleta le rompio una rueda y al reclamar no contestaron ni nos dieron ninguna solucion.A diferencia de unos dias , nuestra amiga que tenia que ir a Daun pregunto por la resolucion del problema y dijeron que la maleta podria ya haber estado rota, cosa que no es verdad ya que cuando llegamos al hotel funccionaban las 4 ruedas.

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Komentar: La villa bastante bien, aunque no tenía utensilios de cocina, ni cocina para hacerse nada, aún así la habitación está muy bien y nueva. Lo mejor el masaje que nos dimos de 90 min, uno de los mejores de bali
Complexe de villas en plein milieu des rizières. Le personnel est accueillant et très gentil. Je recommande 👍👍👍
Tout était au top Le personnel la nourriture la propreté le seul hic c’est que vous ne pouvez pas prendre de taxi online attention c’est uniquement les taxi qui travaille avec l’hôtel donc plus chère

Trop loin de tout et les chambres sont sale. J’avais demandé à changer de chambre ils m’ont mis à côté des cuisines ça sentais mauvais et du coup j’ai demandé à changer il m’a dit ok et pour finalement me remettre dans la chambre sale une incompétence totale. Je recommande pas.

Tipe Kamar: Two Bedroom Villa With Private Pool
Komentar: Villa avec 2 chambres et piscine privée ! Calme et tranquillité Un peu loin de la ville! Mais agréable !!
nice place

Nous avons passé 4 jours au sein de notre petite villa. Le seul hic et que 4 jours c’est trop peu!!! - La villa est magnifique, décorée avec beaucoup de goût et impeccable au niveau de la propreté. - Le petit dej et diner peuvent être servis tous les jours dans la villa, le petit dej est très varié et très bon! Quel plaisir de se réveiller et de trouver le petit dej prêt. - Nous avons également essayé le spa, rien a dire top! Super expérience - Nous avons fait une journée tour d’ubud et environs en voiture( waterfall, temples, rizière et plantation de café) avec Sandy je recommande c’était vraiment sympa. - Le staff est hyper serviable et d’une gentillesse jamais vu! Merci à eux de nous avoir chouchouté! - le centre ville d’ubud est un peu loin (40 min en scoot), vous pouvez louer le scooter directement a l’accueil Bref un séjour inoubliable!
Traumhaft schön!
Very lovely people, hideaway from “tourist” Bali

De villa was erg mooi, groot en schoon! Van alle luxe voorzien. De locatie is erg afgelegen en er zit helemaal niets in de omgeving dit zorgt ervoor dat je wel moet eten bij Daun lebar. Dit is opzich geen probleem echter is het eten erg matig van kwaliteit en erg duur. Voor een nasi goreng betaal je 70K excl. 21% tax. Bij een gewone warung betaal je daar Max 45K voor. Daarbij is het handig als je een driver hebt. Vanuit Daun Lebar hebben ze drivers die ongeveer het dubbele vragen dan een gewone driver en het driedubbele van een Grab taxi. (600k naar canggu). Prima villa om een nachtje je terug te trekken uit de drukte van Bali.

Judul: Very very far away from everything
Komentar: We stayed 3 nights at the villa, it was very far from everything... 40 minutes to ubud center, nothing near the hotel to see... No markets or restaurants near by, so we depend on the hotel restaurant for everything, and the hotel restaurant was very poor... The villa was beautiful but need some maintenance. The massage on the spa was never avaliable.

Judul: スタッフが良かったです
Komentar: 場所が思ったより遠く不便でしたが、スタッフの対応がとても良かったです！ シャワーの水圧も今までで一番ありました！ ルームサービスもしましたが、ご飯も美味しかったです。

Judul: リッチでオシャレな滞在にオススメ！
Komentar: 3ベッドルームに友人と3人で宿泊しました(*^^) v1人一部屋で、めちゃくちゃ良かった!!料金は、高くないです◎ ロビーから、ヴィラ全てがオシャレだし、部屋もキレイで虫も少なめです。 虫除けスプレーを部屋にシュッとしといたら、全然いなかったです。 ただ、ゴミ箱はトイレ横のサニタリーゴミ箱(少し大きめ)しか各部屋にありません。 あとは、リビングの流しの下のみ。 あと、栓抜きがリビングにも1本もなく、1日目はスプーンで開ける羽目に(ㆆ_ㆆ) 電話したら、ルームサービスの人が居ないから明日しか分からないと言われました！ 各部屋の歯磨き用の水もビンなのに、、、 あと、ドライヤーがメインベッドルームに1個しかありません。しかも小さい風量イマイチなやつ。そして、1日目に壊れました～。ドライヤーと栓抜きは持参がイイかもです(￣▽￣) 旅行前のやり取りのレスポンスも早く安心な宿です！ただ、バースデー祝いは有料でサービスないみたいです。 バリで流行りのフローティングブレックファーストも出来るみたいですよ！ ビール5本とピザセットとかもあったな～。 ヴィラでまったりもオススメです！ プールも広く、リビングも寛げました！ また行きたい！！ ただ、ウブドの北側になるので空港から直接来ちゃうと2時間半もかかります。 バリの車や運転で、2時間半はキツいです！ 寄り道しながら、向かうのがオススメですよ(^^♪

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Villa with Private Pool
Komentar: Location and Service: The hotel is quite far from the city center. The staff entered the room before the official check-out time to notify us, which was inconvenient. Additionally, there was only one shuttle service available, leading to long wait times and insufficient transportation options for guests. Hot Water Issue: The hot water in the room was not working. Although we reported it for repair, the problem was not resolved during our stay, which affected our comfort.

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Komentar: Villa looks quite new with full facilities. Pool is very big then you can enjoy with enogh space. Don't forget to take photo at dinning place. It's very beautiful view.

Judul: ที่พักน่ารัก สะอาด ใหม่ การดูแลดีเยี่ยมมากค่ะ
Komentar: การบริการดีมากค่ะ พนักงานน่ารักทุกคน และอาหารอร่อยถูกปากคนไทยมาก แนะนำเลยค่ะ อาจจะอยู่ห่างจากอูบุดหน่อย แต่ถ้าสำหรับกรุปครอบครัวที่อยากพักผ่อน แนะนำเลยค่ะ
Villa yang sangat bagus nyaman keren luas. Tp sayang hanya jauh kemana2 dan akses gofood dan grabfood susah. Jd harus beli makanan dulu sblom k villa
Tempatnya keren fasilitas lengkap banyak spots buat fotoan, adem banget banyak tanaman disekitar villa, tempatnya ditengah desa jadi sensasi naturalnya kerasa banget

Lokasi nya di tengah sawah sehingga cocok untuk tamu yang mencari ketenangan dan suasana persawahan. Fasilitas cukup lengkap sampai apabila hendak masak sendiri. Kualitas bangunan baru dan bagus walaupun ada beberapa yang masih dapat disempurnakan mengingat baru buka 1 bulan yang lalu.

So many insects , Every where in the bedroom and living room. The most severe is in the living room with hundreds of dead insects on the sofa and floor. The staff also got shocked by the crazy scenario.

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Villa with Private Pool
Komentar: 地方偏遠，設備未齊就比房入住，無熨斗無枱，用蒸餾咖啡機代替電熱水壺。淋浴間第一日去唔到水，要叫人維修。
雖然也在烏布但其實離烏布皇宮市區有半小時以上車程距離，交通並不方便，要有入住後到退房不會再出門的打算，也沒有什麼娛樂設施，villa游泳池尚可，因為在山中所以房內濕氣較重，比較建議是一家人入住，不然真會有些無聊。
酒店如圖所示 十分美 房間沒有什麼昆蟲 泳池乾淨 酒店的餐廳東西是很好吃 十分推薦 除了位置有點遠 搵間附近風景很值得 很喜歡
地點偏遠 房間和餐廳都不乾淨很多蒼蠅（揮蒼蠅揮到不用吃早餐）而且也不好吃啦～還有蜥蜴？ 跑來偷吃漂浮早餐⋯ 電燈壞了說隔天會來修但是也沒來 除了一位戴牙套的小姐人很好 不厭其煩的幫助我們 是一位可愛的小姐 其他人就算了 尤其是按摩的那位小姐 爛斃了
我們是villas開幕第一批入住的房客，各方面都非常滿意，除了地點離市區遠了些外其他都無可挑惕，推薦給大家

Judul: Bad service and amenities with slow response
Komentar: On the first day, everything looks nice, but there is not hairdryer in the room, I need to contact the staff bring 2 for us. When we ask for how to turn on the ceiling fan in the room, the staff told us that was the decoration, however the fan suddenly turn on automatically. I don’t know that they don’t want to tell us or for other reason, it is a little bit odd, but we are fine about this. When we come back the villa at night, after shower we want to take a bath before sleep, but there was no hot water for the bath tub. On the second day morning, there is still no hot water for the bath tub, so we contact the staff through whatsapp, but there response is really really slow, they finally sent someone to check with the tube after one hour later after we contacted them, which delay my whole schedule on that day. Anyway, when I asked for change another room with hot water provided in the tub, they accepted and changed for us. We tried the water before we leave in the afternoon , it is hot enough for taking a bath, and I also reminded the staff to prepare 2 hairdryers in our room. However, when we came back at night, the hot water for bath tub was stopped AGAIN!!! Even for shower only. The staff NEVER told us the hot water will stopped after 12 am, or even I asked about this, they didn’t replay me. And, the water flow was very very slow, even worse than the room that we stayed on the first night. So me and my family cannot use the tub again as we bring lots of bath bomb here for relaxation, it really upset us and ruin our holiday. Also, there is no hairdryer in the room, so I need to go out to ask for it in the late night and they can only provide one for us and even not work properly. I told them about this situation at late night and I also ordered the breakfast at 9am, I understood that this is not their operation hour, so I expected that they we reply us in the next morning. I woke up at 830am in the next morning, still cannot hear any reply through the whatsapp. And after 9am, the breakfast did not sent to our room, so I need to walk out directly to the reception and ask them did they check my messages, unfortunately they didn’t, they check the messages in front of me… I understood that their operation is from 7am to 11pm, but why they didn’t check the messages when they work again, I think I have provided enough time for them to reply, even just for the breakfast but not the problem in our room. Later on, they ask for the engineer to check with the tube, but it is 10am already. We cannot use the tube even they fixed it, they come in and out in the villa, which disturb our breakfast time. Finally the engineer told me that he fixed the tube now but need to wait 30 mins for hot water at 1030am, but we need to check out at 12pm, so we definitely cannot use the tube before we leave. The villa really disappointed me and my family and ruined our holiday as we spend quite a lot of time to deal with this. If the villa only cost me $500HKD/night, I can accept all this problem. But it’s not, the villa charged me $1300HKD/nighht, I don’t think that this service and the amenities is expected. And I will not recommend this villa to all of my friends and family because of the really bad experience this time, I believe there will be other villa better than this in ubud at this price. I hope Agoda will so some follow up with my situation and I hope Agoda won’t disappoint me.
가족이 묶기좋음 우붓이시내랑 멀지만 직원이택시 불러주고 아주 친절..숲세권이라 도마뱀..벌레가 많음 주위.

Judul: 발리까지 왔는데 이런 숙소 때문에... 비추천
Komentar: 다른 사람들은 모르겠으나 공항에서 부터 2시간?? 시속 20~40km 속력으로?? 적어도 3시간은 잡아야 한다 어디를 갈려고 해도 숙소로 돌아올려면 1시간 ~ 2시간 걸려서 너무 불편하다 숙소 도착하였으나 주차장도 쫍고 짐옴기게 도와주는 사람도 없다 숙소 입구까지 가는 길도 어둡고 바닥이 미끄럽고 냄새가 많이 난다 숙소 입고에 전들이 고장나 문열쇠를 한참 찾고 이동시 문열쇠가 너무 불편하게 되어 있다 숙소 입실시 데크가 많이 깨져잇어서 아이들이 놀다가 다칠까 겁이난다 또한 쥐들이 많으니 음식물을 조심하라고 하는데... 먹으라는건지 말라는건지... 주변에 먹을수 있는것들이 없기에 룸서비스를 시켯지만 음식이 제대로 된건지 안된건지.... 아무리 비가 많이 왔다고 하지만 수영장 물이 너무 더럽고 이용하기 싫을 정도였다 3베드룸을 신청하였는데 욕조는 1개가 다였고 뜨거운 물도 잘 안나온다고 항의 했다 인포메이션에 연락할 수 잇는 방법은 개인 핸드폰으로 연락해야 한다 숙소 내 커튼 먼지 자국도 많고 세탁을 안했는지 너무 더러웠다 이불과 캐노피에는 찌든때와 피 자국이 잇엇다 베게는 침자국이 그대로 있엇고 화장실 배변기가 고장나서 물채워지는 소리가 계속나서 잠도 설쳤다 방마다 귀금속을 보관하는 금고가 잇어야 하는데 1개만 있엇고 모든 중요항목을 거기에 넣어야 한다는 건가.... 사진을 업로드 해주고 싶은데 리뷰에는 그런 항목이 없다 아마 컴플레인하면 이숙소다 아니다고 비아냥 거리겠지만 고액의 숙소를 잡을때는 리뷰한번 읽어봐주자 발리까지 왔는데 하필 숙소를 잘못 잡아서 이틀을 버린 것 같다 가성비도 별로고 숙소에서 할 수 있는것이 없다
It has bit of distance from Ubud city but and quiet place to stay. very friendly staff. Time to change some of facilities and fix.Overall we enjoyed our stay.
직원들이 매우 친절합니다. 다만 숙소가 외진 곳에 있어 택시를 부르기가 어렵습니다. 다행히도 리셉션에 연락하면 콜택시를 불러줍니다.

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Komentar: 가격대비 안족스러운 풀빌라 시내에서 30~40분 들가야하는 시골 농촌 주위에 논밭이 다임
아이동반은 꼭오세요 직원들이 엄청 친절합니다.

시골스러운 여유롭고 조용한 위치에 있습니다. 남편은 숙소 중 여기가 가장 좋다고 하더라구요. 전 햇반을 데워먹을 수 있는 전자렌지가 없는 것이 아쉬웠습니다. 하지만 부탁드리면 데워서 접시에 곱게 담아서 주십니다. 조식은 레스토랑에서 골라서 주문할 수 있어서 좋았습니다. 주변에 마트가 없으니, 꼭 숙소 들어가시기 전에 기사분께 마트 들러가 가달라고 부탁하셔서 필요한것들 사서 가세요. 개인적으로 코코마트 추천합니다.
숲속에 위치한 빌라라 되게 프라이빗하며 조용하고 쾌적합니다 직원분들이 아주 친절하고 빌라자체가 크지 않아서 걸어서 금방 둘러보실 수 있습니다 수영장 풀이 크진 않으나 생각보다 깊고 관리가 잘 되어 있습니다. 위치가 우붓에서 차로 20분 가량 들어가야해서 그게 단점이긴 하지만 숙소에서 쉬실분들에게 추천드립니다.

위치는 산속에 있어서 공항에서 조금 오래 걸립니다 그치만 시원해요! 그리고 아주 아주 아주 친절해요 너무 친절해서 죄송할 정도 그리고 방이 커요 화장실은 더 커요 풀도 작은 듯 보이지만 막상 들어가면 크고 깊습니다 두 명이서 수영하기 너무 좋았어요 하나 아쉬운 점은 식당이 10시에 닫아요 배달도 안 되는 지역이라 식사를 원한다면 뭘 사서 들어오거나 일찍 많이 시킨 다음 나중에 먹어야 합니다 ㅜㅜ 인테리어나 청결도 다 괜찮았고 저는 도마뱀 하나도 보이지 않아서 좋았어요
상상 그 이상. 청결 상태며 침구며 어매니티며 인테리어&시설 모두 최고!! 왜 4성급인지 이해가 안갈 정도네요. 수영장에 부유물도 전혀없고 완벽한 수영장! 체크아웃이 너무 아쉬웠고 발리에서 최고의 숙소였습니다
지은지 오래되지 않은곳이라 그런지 너무 좋았으나 우붓 시내에서는 거리가 멀어 위치적으로는 불편함이 있었다. 직원들 모두 친절하고 너무 좋았다. 다만 로비쪽에는 파리가 너무 많아 밥먹을때는 불편했다
房间够大，卫生过得去，很安静，不足的是离市区有点远，打车去乌布热闹的地方大概30到40分钟

酒店设计风格简约清新，跟网站看的差不多，挺漂亮的，浪漫晚餐布置很不错，只是后来因同事间没交接好要跟我们收费，实在。。。（我们订的是包括晚餐的，接待员自己说是浪漫晚餐的）虽然最后没收，但心情着实受影响，餐厅开放式所以很多苍蝇，有待改进，泳池不干净，池底有虫子，不敢用，垃圾桶袋虽然循环使用环保但感觉很不卫生，酒店设施很少除了呆房间基本没什么东西，check in 的时候态度不错，但是check out 的时候真不咋嘀

Kalo suka tempat sepi , jauh dari kebisingan ( yes it the villa) bagus lah lokasi nya. tapi kebersihan villa perlu perhatian lebih. Daerah masuk pedesaan ( saya mau exercise, mau jogging takut banyak anjing liar di dalam pedesaan) Bantal di kamar utama yg boleh saya bilang ( bantal nya bau APEK ) trus lampu kamar ga bisa di switch off pas di atas bantal. Saya di parkir kan mobil ( tinggal kunci tapi di vallet di tempat rumah kosong, besok nya banyak semut hitam di luar mobil & sampai masuk masuk dalam interior mobil) Waktu masuk area villa memang kalo paparan dengan mobil hanya cukup 1 mobil ( harus sabar menggiring) Dari city ubud perlu waktu _+ 50 menit -÷ 25 Km ( 50 menit during new year ) Over all i rekomendasi villa kalo mau jauh dari keramaian. Fasilitas nya minimal, lahan parkir ( seperti nya kurang ya . Kena sarang semut kalo di taruh rumah kosong )bantal nya bau keringat / bau bantal basah ga kering bener .
Villa bagus, bersih, kamar besar dan bersih, ada kolam renang di dalam villa.. Pelayanan ok.

Agak takut awalnya karena harganya yg murah. Tapi ternyata worthed bgt! Bagus villanya, staffnya keren, ramah, baik lah. Satu aja kekurangannya, lokasinya agak jauh ke mana2. Klo suka yg tenang cocok bgt lah nih villa. Well done!! Thank you so much yah 🫶🫶

Judul: Staff ramah,villa bersih,lokasi cocok untuk istirahat

Overall staff ramah,kebersihan villa sangat baik. Very recommended villa!!!
saya suka kmr mandi luas, lengkap, bersih dan berfungsi baik, walau akses msk agak jauh tapi ok dgn view persawahan hijau dan segar, rekomended vila ini👍

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Komentar: طلبت من الاستقبال يجيبون لي غطاء سرير ثاني لانه وسخ بعد 30 دقيقة جاء العامل وانا كنت في الغرفة ومقفل باب الفيلا والمفتاح داخل الباب، المفاجأة ان العامل فتح باب الفيلا الخارجي بمفتاحه ودخل علي الغرفة بحجة انه جاي ينظف وهو يعلم اني موجود داخل الفيلا، الموظف قليل ادب و إدارة الفندق مب مهتمين ويدافعون عن الموظف ايضا
Hơi xa nhưng villa rất đẹp, có hồ bơi riêng, đầy đủ tiện nghi

Tipe Kamar: Two Bedroom Villa With Private Pool
Komentar: 1. Rip off Massage service, on their ads in the villa it says price is all inclusive, including taxes.But upon check out reception will insist you need to pay additional for tax. That is illegal. If you ask for more than youre published rate, then what you are doing is illegal. 2. Too far from Ubud Center. Better options nearer the center. Pool is so cold not swimmable. 3. Dont book here. It ruined our holiday.

Judul: Çalışanları cok iyi ve cok güvenli
Komentar: Herkes yardım sever müthiş iyiler restorantındaki yemekler cok iyi ve kaliteli sadece konum olarak uzak ve yerel taksiciler fazla fiat alıyor grep giremiyor otel odaları ve havuz cok iyi konum uzak ubud merkezden

Judul: 便宜舒適的住宿但離烏布鬧區偏遠
Komentar: 位在烏布北邊的鄉間，要叫車或外送都要等一段時間，幸好有餐廳可以點些食物，價格也不貴。除了Villa的私人泳池，也有一個公用的泳池，旁邊還有SPA服務 住宿的Villa房間簡單素雅，浴室還算好用，但備品最好自備，因為只有牙刷跟棉花棒，沒有擦手巾或毛巾只有大浴巾(還拿到破掉的)，也沒有附吹風機需要跟前台借，但隔天早上馬上被索回，一個房型附上至少一個吹風機很難嗎? 因為住在鄉間，難免會有螞蟻、蜘蛛或飛蛾等昆蟲，不喜愛者請三思。每天進來打掃包括泳池清潔算是不錯的 服務人員大多數是友善的

Judul: 史上最糟糕的住宿體驗
Komentar: 這間是我人生截至目前為止住過體驗最差的飯店，敬告預定這間飯店的人三思。 先說好的部分：入住隔日的早上外出時，早餐自助吧的服務人員看我們有人沒用早餐，來詢問我們是否需要幫我們外帶，很體貼的幫我們用紙盒分裝好還提供塑膠袋給我們帶出門，非常謝謝那位貼心的工作人員❤️ 糟糕的部分： 第一晚入住check in接待我們的服務人員態度不佳，很明顯能感覺到她敷衍我們，她的口音偏重所以即便說英文也很難聽得懂，且也沒有想要嘗試讓彼此可以順利溝通的誠意，最後請導遊來溝通才順利解決。 飯店因為地處偏僻建議連飯店WiFi， 連WiFi密碼都還要特地問櫃檯人員才知道，因為是villa的關係room service是用WhatsApp溝通，也是事後我們發現房內有問題另外走去櫃檯問才知道的，櫃檯人員從頭到尾都沒有說明。 進到房間後，房內的泳池磁磚地有一塊位移，電視說有Netflix和YouTube也都無法使用，房內櫃子和浴室洗手台上有很多螞蟻，且床單有發霉和污漬，備品除了基本的洗沐組外只有牙刷牙膏和基本的大浴巾，甚至連吹風機都沒有。 用WhatsApp請飯店送吹風機過來，得到的回答是housekeeping下班了要等到隔天早上才能送來，電視則是過來看過後表示故障了要等明天請人來修理。 隔天一早就一直提醒他們當天一定要送吹風機來，還請同行友人去問過了也得到回覆說會送，最後晚上我們回到飯店一樣沒送吹風機過來，電視一樣沒修好，房間整理了但備品只補了一間房間的，另一間房間已使用的牙刷直接被丟掉也沒補新的完全不知道在幹嘛。 我直接WhatsApp訊息指責該飯店的服務非常糟糕，前交代萬提醒還忘記送，服務人員的回覆相當慢就也回的很沒誠意，隔天早上我們都要退房了才送吹風機過來，令人非常傻眼。 這真的是讓人覺得非常差勁的住宿體驗，服務糟糕衛生不佳甚至連基本的備品都要要求2天到要退房才提供，完全不推薦舟車勞頓到這裡來住宿，你只會帶一肚子氣回家而已！
房間在深山裡，周圍沒有店家，必須要有交通工具，房間很乾淨，可惜沒有足夠的吹風機，需要到前台借用，電視很難用，工作人員很熱情

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Judul: 浴缸及淋浴間熱水不能同時使用
Komentar: 入住日期弄錯了 浴缸及淋浴間熱水不能同時使用 基本設備都不齊全, 沒有熱水壺, 拖鞋
1.Villa很新，但馬桶不是很通，熱水也不太熱。 2.原本入住時飯店人員說早上11：00-16：00到烏布市區是免費的。但隔天的服務生又說不行。於是請飯店幫我們租車載我們到梯田或烏布皇宮。一整天的行程也給了司機費用。退房時飯店人員竟然又要我們付一筆租車費用... 3.早餐的食物也不好吃，晚餐的牛排整塊過熟非常難吃...

It’s a beautiful villa but the cabs won’t reach and you’ll have to book a car every time which becomes a costly affair. It was my birthday and at such high prices too, the villa didn’t even agree to give complimentary pancake when requested which was quite disappointing

Judul: Pleasant stay and worth the money paid.
Komentar: Pros: Private pool, good breakfast, quiet and perfect for staycation. Cons: Many frogs broke in our toilet because there was a gap on the bathtub mirror. The sofa outside our room was a bit dirty. The road to go to the villa was not a tar road. The location was a bit far to the Ubud central.
Great for couple without kids, workers smiles are gems, food is good too, and come with many events where you won’t feel bored
Tempatnya private, tamannya indah beserta pool. Kamar juga sangat nyaman, dan kamar mandi luas. Kurang kitchen tapi semuanya TOP⭐️🌟🌟

The villa was quite far away from Ubud (about 30~40mins+ drive) and tucked away in a remote area where the roads had no lights at night. Upon reaching the villa, we noticed that one of the cupboards in bedroom 2 was full of dead insects, which the staff cleaned up upon request. Also, bedroom 1 (the bigger room) had an insect mesh but bedroom 2 did not. Bedroom 2 had a working fan, but bedroom 1 did not. So the person sleeping in bedroom 2 had insects falling on her all night, and the ones sleeping in bedroom 1 had to sleep with a portable fan on. Staff said that they are working to uninstall all the fans in the room as they installed aircon, but the small aircon was insufficient to cool the size of the larger room. The pool water was murky so we didn't dare let our baby swim in it. The outdoor dining area where the TV was has a of insects and some lizards, which is understandable as the villa is near rice fields (should have done more research). It gets worse at night when the lights are on so we could not finish our dinner in peace. The food was also below average as the rice was not well cooked and meat wasn't fresh. When we tried to take a shower, the showerhead in bedroom 1 wasn't working and 1 of the towels still had makeup foundation stains on it. Overall, I would say it's average for it's price, but I wouldn't book it again especially not with young children.
Good place to enjoyed with family.

Tipe Kamar: Deluxe One Bedroom Private Pool Villa
Komentar: No room slippers, bathroom was dirty. It’s very far to the town takes about 50 mins to go anywhere near to the town.

We unfortunately only stayed one night so we’re not able to enjoy all the facilities as possible but the rooms were clean and well stocked and the entire apartment had a private pool also. We literally only slept there. Staff were professional and extremely helpful 🎈

Let's begin with the staff, one of the receptionists was unfriendly. The location is not in Ubud, yet outside of Ubud. Somehow the access is quite difficult as I drive a car by myself. The food is absolutely lovely. The furniture was dirty, e.g. the sofa in the living room and the sun bed at the pool was dirty, the room has no key (broken) so we left the property with door unlocked.
Beautiful , comfy, clean
Lovely villa Great food at restaurant

I was terrible disappointing for me and my friends we manage to stay there for 3 nights we wanted to leave in the first night. Refuse to give us the refund , for us to find a other accommodation. We requested to speak with the manager, they said no he is on holiday, I was so mad of the poor services . food was same morning , lunch, &dinner . Spider all around the showers , if we wanted to go out for dinner we need to go over haft hours away and the food was terrible too. That place is for all people. We 100% regrets staying at the place. First time and last . I had to apologise to my friend. For the bad 3 day we had.

Judul: best to relax and enjoy the nature
Komentar: The villa is a very spacious, quiet and cozy place to relax if you're not travelling much around. We stayed in a 2BRD villa and the kids enjoyed the private pool. The service was excellent and the staffs there are very helpful and pleasing. The only negative is if we have to travel around we cannot book Grab taxi and we have to use the restaurant taxi which is ok as they're helping the local people but if we are on a budget these cost a fortune if you need to travel a lot. But if you're looking for a place to sit back, relax and enjoy the food and pool then this is the best option.
Fantastic arrangements for everything especially the romantic dinner...

We loved the serenity and isolation of the property however it is hard getting in and out of the property and there are no shuttle services. Grabcar to Ubud city centre cost about 150k to 200k rupiah per way and will take approx 30-40mins. I suggest getting back before sunset as the narrow and curvy road leading towards the property had no street lights and seems dangerous. I suggest bringing back food for dinner than dining in. Great thing was that we had the main pool almost to ourself most days and evenings and it was great. Value for money however we wouldn’t recommend the villa due to its location being too far away from everything. Something we initially thought was okay but later regretted.
Location is not in ubud. Pool dirty, didn't get to dip in. Room and toilet very musty.
